nasb.text: But when the sun sets, he will be clean, and afterward he shall eat of the holy gifts, for it is his food.

esv.text: When the sun goes down he shall be clean, and afterward he may eat of the holy things, because they are his food.

cnv.text: 日落之後，他就潔淨了，可以吃聖物，因為那是他的食物。

ccb.text: 日落之后，他就洁净了，可以吃圣物，因为那是他应得的食物。
